questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Value Functions?
options: Inefficient scaling of LEAD(), LAG() offset lookbehinds.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of LEAD(), LAG() offset lookbehinds.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how LEAD(), LAG() offset lookbehinds scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
